name: Weather Integration
summary: Created weather_metrics.py using Open-Meteo API (no API key required). Supports historical data up to 16 days via forecast API with past_days parameter. WMO weather codes mapped to human-readable descriptions with emojis. Added get_weekly_weather() to performance_data.py.

test_results.live_api_test: PASSED - Retrieved 7 days of Brooklyn weather

notes: Uses Brooklyn, NY coordinates (40.6782, -73.9442) as default. Temperature in Fahrenheit. Precipitation in inches.
